zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Tibbetts於1658年4月15日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾時，她的父親Jeremiah Tibbetts28歲，母親Mary Canney21歲。她於1674年7月與Ichabod Rawlins在美國緬因州約克素斯 貝維其可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1688年在她的家鄉享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Tibbetts于1658年4月15日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾时，她的父亲Jeremiah Tibbetts28岁，母亲Mary Canney21岁。她于1674年7月与Ichabod Rawlins在美国缅因州約克素斯 貝維其可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1688年在她的家乡享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tibbetts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire): variant of Tebbutt , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Tibbets
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Tibbetts  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tebbetts
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): variant of   Tibbetts  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tebbutt
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Tebot, a rhyming variant of Ebot, itself a variant of Ibot, a pet form of Isabel. See Isbell and Hibbitt , and compare Tibbett . In some instances it may alternatively be an altered form of the Middle English surname Tebald, Tebaut; see Theobald .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Tibbetts was born on 15 April 1658, in New Hampshire, British Colonial America, her father, Jeremiah Tibbetts, was 28 and her mother, Mary Canney, was 21. She married Ichabod Rawlins in July 1674, in South Berwick, York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1688, in her hometown, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Tibbetts est née le 15 avril 1658, à New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Jeremiah Tibbetts, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary Canney, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Ichabod Rawlins en juillet 1674, à South Berwick, York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1688, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Tibbetts am 15. April 1658 in New Hampshire, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jeremiah Tibbetts 28 und ihre Mutter Mary Canney 21. Sie hat im Juli 1674 in South Berwick, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Ichabod Rawlins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1688 im Alter von 30 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Tibbetts è nata il il 15 aprile 1658 nel New Hampshire, British Colonial America, sua padre, Jeremiah Tibbetts, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mary Canney, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Ichabod Rawlins nel luglio 1674, nel South Berwick, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1688, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Tibbettsが1658年4月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Jeremiah Tibbettsは28歳，母Mary Canneyは21歳であった。1674年7月にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークソウス バーウィックでIchabod Rawlinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1688年に故郷で30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Tibbetts(이)가 1658년 4월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jeremiah Tibbetts(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Canney(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1674년 7월 미국 메인 주 요르크 소우스 버윅에서 Ichabod Rawlins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1688년 그녀의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Tibbetts nasceu em 15 de abril de 1658, em New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, Jeremiah Tibbetts, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Canney, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Ichabod Rawlins em julho de 1674, em South Berwick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1688, em sua cidade natal, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Tibbetts родилась 15 апреля 1658 г. в местности ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Jeremiah Tibbetts было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Canney, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ichabod Rawlins июль 1674 г. в местности соут бирвикк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1688 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Tibbetts nació el 15 de abril de 1658, en New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, Jeremiah Tibbetts, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mary Canney, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ichabod Rawlins en julio de 1674, en South Berwick, York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1688, en su pueblo, a la edad de 30 años.
